song.title: Jesus Keep Me Near the Cross
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, keep me near the cross, There a precious fountain, Free to all— a healing stream, Flows from Calv’ry’s mountain.
[C] Chorus In the cross, in the cross, Be my glory ever; From the cross my ransomed soul Nothing then shall sever.
[V2] 2) Near the cross, a trembling soul, Love and mercy found me; There the Bright and Morning Star Sheds its beams around me.
[V3] 3) Near the cross! O Lamb of God, Bring its scenes before me; Help me walk from day to day, With its shadow o’er me.
[V4] 4) Near the cross I’ll watch and wait, Hoping, trusting ever, Till I see my Savior’s face, Leave His presence never.
song.author: Fanny J Crosby
